limitations: advisor findings are review candidates and do not authorize bulk fixes
planner row estimates are not reconciliation counts
index priority is a business-chain candidate and still requires query, lock and write-amplification evidence
security findings remain unaccepted until isolated six-identity and direct-API tests pass
